mood: Apple Intelligence meets Jarvis. Elite, responsive, 'living', and deeply integrated with the OS.

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: flex-col layout, strict vertical flow, no standard grid needed for this form factor.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Optical centering for the Orb. Left-aligned for logs and chat to mimic terminal precision.

components.window_container: bg-[#09090b]/40 backdrop-blur-3xl rounded-[32px] border border-white/10 shadow-[0_0_80px_rgba(0,0,0,0.8)] overflow-hidden flex flex-col
components.header: h-14 flex items-center justify-between px-6 border-b border-white/5 shrink-0
components.orb_container: flex-1 flex flex-col items-center justify-center relative w-full
components.tool_execution_feed: h-32 bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-md border-t border-white/5 px-6 py-4 overflow-y-auto font-mono text-xs text-white/60 flex flex-col gap-2 relative z-10 shadow-[inset_0_20px_20px_-20px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)]
components.status_bar: h-16 px-6 flex items-center justify-between bg-white/[0.02] border-t border-white/5 shrink-0
components.chat_message_user: self-end bg-white/10 border border-white/5 text-white text-sm px-4 py-2 rounded-2xl rounded-tr-sm max-w-[80%]
components.chat_message_assistant: self-start text-white/80 text-sm py-2 max-w-[90%] font-light
components.button_icon: w-8 h-8 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-white/60 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors cursor-pointer
components.button_primary: px-4 py-2 bg-white text-black font-medium text-sm rounded-full hover:bg-white/90 transition-all active:scale-95

motion_and_interactions.global: Subtle, premium, and performant. Use Framer Motion. 0.2s to 0.4s ease-out transitions.

orb_states.idle: Slow, subtle breathing. Core scales [0.98, 1.02, 0.98] over 4 seconds. Box shadow pulses gently.
orb_states.listening: Active pulsing. Multiple rings expanding outward (scale 1 to 1.5, opacity 0.5 to 0). Core scales based on simulated voice amplitude.
orb_states.thinking: Rotational energy. Conic gradient or border-radius morphing (e.g., ["50%", "40%", "50%"]). Colors shift between cyan and indigo.
orb_states.speaking: Waveform simulation. Core pulses rapidly and sharply. Glow intensity increases.

transitions.panel_slide: y: [20, 0], opacity: [0, 1], transition: { type: 'spring', stiffness: 300, damping: 30 }

icons.usage: Use for top header (Settings, Close) and bottom status bar (Microphone, Keyboard toggle).

media.notes: No external imagery required. The interface relies entirely on CSS, Glassmorphism, and Framer Motion for the animated Orb.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over glass meets APCA standards. Use text-shadow on small text if needed.
accessibility.data_testid_requirements: All buttons, inputs, and the log container MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., 'settings-btn', 'mic-toggle-btn', 'tool-log-feed').

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a 400x600px desktop app window using Tailwind CSS and Framer Motion.
Do NOT use standard Shadcn cards. Use raw HTML/Tailwind for the glassmorphic window container to ensure the 'Apple' premium feel.
Implement the Orb as a purely CSS/Framer Motion component. It should sit in the center of the UI and transition between idle, listening, thinking, and speaking states.
The tool execution feed must use JetBrains Mono, auto-scroll to the bottom, and look like a clean, high-end terminal.
Use Phosphor Icons (duotone weight) for all UI icons.
Add global hotkey logic placeholder or UI hints.
Include a mock confirmation dialog for destructive actions using Shadcn Dialog (customized to match the dark glass theme, border-white/10, bg-black/80).
